ipv6-parser-bug.note: 2022 branch. Changes re-add dart:core import (we removed), rename SubdomainType to Type. IPv6 logic changes are minimal and redundant with current code. NOT worth porting.

disallow-control-characters.note: 2022 branch. Adds _isControl helper (codeUnit <= 31 or == 127) in _isAtom - but ASCII control chars already blocked by existing atom char check. C1 control chars (128-159) not addressed. NOT worth porting.
